title: Standardize heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu.conf in firmware/bridge-zephyr/boards/
description: Update the bridge-zephyr version to include consistent LICHEN_L2, LORA_L2, CoAP settings and detailed comments matching the canonical puck version where applicable for the bridge use case. Align SPDX, copyright, and remove any divergence from the resolved merge.
